title: set
text: set Set the value of the specified ProcScript function to 1 ( TRUE ). set ProcScriptFunction Example: set $fieldcheck Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description ProcScriptFunction Literal ProcScript function Return Values Table 2. Values returned in $status Value Meaning <0 set cannot be used with ProcScriptFunction . 0 ProcScriptFunction was successfully reset. Use Allowed in all component types except self-contained Report and Services. Description The set statement resets the value of the ProcScript function ProcScriptFunction to True ( 0 ). It can be used only with functions for which this feature is documented. Example: set $occcheck The following example uses set to change the value of $occcheck to TRUE ( 1 ): operation exec ; set $occcheck to TRUE to enable checking name = $1 retrieve set $occcheck(INVOICE) edit NAME end; exec Copy Related Links reset Reset the value of the specified ProcScript function to 0.
